title: Increase Your Expectation for What God Wants to Do This Year - Bill Johnson Sermon | Bethel Church
description:
Bill Johnson teaches on God’s reward system and encourages us to increase our expectations for what God wants to do. As we approach a new year, let us consider what God has put in our hand and dream about how He would increase it. God’s Father heart towards us is good and He longs to bless us and increase everything that we are stewarding. Hebrews 11: 6 teaches that God rewards those who diligently seek Him, and the parable of the talents reveals the increase that God wants for us. Whatever we are stewarding, whether it be faith, our prayer life, relationships, resources, spiritual revelation, business, or other, let’s dream and continue to lean into God for growth and increase. When we truly believe that God is good we will live with confidence and purpose as we seek Him and walk in greater power and authority in the Holy Spirit. 

Subscribe for weekly videos:
https://www.youtube.com/c/BillJohnsonMinistries

Scripture References:
Hebrews 11
Matthew 6: 33
Matthew 25
1 Corinthians 3: 10-15
Galatians 6: 7
1 Samuel 17
Proverbs 25: 2
1 Samuel 5-6
2 Samuel 6

Originally shared at Bethel Church, Redding California, on December 27, 2015.

Bill Johnson is a fifth-generation pastor with a rich heritage in the Holy Spirit. He is senior leader of Bethel Church in Redding, California, and is passionate about seeing Revival and God’s Kingdom established and revealed in the lives of individuals, families, communities, and nations. Bill’s teaching on the Kingdom of Heaven, hosting the Presence, and the renewed mind has helped thousands around the world to step into their true identity in Christ, God given purpose, and walk in a supernatural lifestyle displaying both purity and power.

#BillJohnson #BethelChurch #Growth #SpiritualGrowth
